memberdef.argsstring: (vlc_object_t *p_parent, input_item_t *, const char *psz_log, input_resource_t *, vlc_renderer_item_t *p_renderer) VLC_USED
memberdef.name: input_Create

detaileddescription.para: Create a new input_thread_t and start it.
Provided for convenience.
Get the input item for an input thread
You have to keep a reference to the input or to the input_item_t until you do not need it anymore.
It will return the current state of the input. Provided for convenience.

Return one of the video output (if any). If possible, you should use INPUT_GET_VOUTS directly and process all video outputs instead.
p_input
an input thread from which to get a video output
NULL on error, or a video output thread pointer (which needs to be released with vlc_object_release()).

memberdef.argsstring: (input_thread_t *p_input, enum slave_type type, const char *psz_uri, bool b_forced, bool b_notify, bool b_check_ext)
memberdef.name: input_AddSlave

detaileddescription.para: Update the viewpoint of the input thread. The viewpoint will be applied to all vouts and aouts.

parameterdescription.para: if true replace the old viewpoint with the new one. If false, increase/decrease it.

simplesect.para: VLC_SUCCESS or a VLC error code

detaileddescription.para:
Return the audio output (if any) associated with an input.
p_input
an input thread
NULL on error, or the audio output (which needs to be released with vlc_object_release()).
Returns the objects associated to an ES.
You must release all non NULL object using vlc_object_release. You may set pointer of pointer to NULL to avoid retreiving it.

memberdef.argsstring: (input_thread_t *, const char *psz_path, const char *psz_prefix, const char *psz_extension) VLC_USED
memberdef.name: input_CreateFilename

detaileddescription.para: This function creates a sane filename path.
It creates an empty input resource handler.
The given object MUST stay alive as long as the input_resource_t is not deleted.
It releases an input resource.
Forcefully destroys the video output (e.g. when the playlist is stopped).
This function releases all resources (object).

simplesect.para: the current audio output if any. Use vlc_object_release() to drop the reference.

detaileddescription.para: This function creates or recycles an audio output.
This function retains or destroys an audio output.
Prevents the existing audio output (if any) from being recycled.
Input thread interface
